category_sources: source_facts.description says Send emails from your terminal; official GitHub README at https://github.com/charmbracelet/pop says Pop sends emails from the terminal.
display_name_sources: Official README title uses Pop: https://github.com/charmbracelet/pop.
docs_sources: Official README is the primary documentation surface for usage, CLI examples, and configuration: https://github.com/charmbracelet/pop#readme.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/charmbracelet/pop, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies terminal email; official README documents TUI, CLI, Resend, SMTP, and environment configuration.
